subcodes.first_line: O beloved companions of the heart and soul of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The faithless ones have raised a loud cry and unto the lands of the Franks [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران دل و جان عبدالبهاء حضرات بی وفایان نغمه ای بلند نمودند و بفرنگستان
subcodes.subjects: @Hands of the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @review of publications, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
